text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Are we done for the day? That's not
enough! I need to be training way more!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm shooting for number one, not second place! I
won't stop until I can outrace everyone!
choice_data_list: Don't worry, I've prepared some extra sets.
Don't worry, I've prepared some extra sets.
Running is about quality as much as quantity.
Running is about quality as much as quantity.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm shooting for number one, not second place! I
won't stop until I can outrace everyone!
choice_data_list: Don't worry, I've prepared some extra sets.
Don't worry, I've prepared some extra sets.
Running is about quality as much as quantity.
Running is about quality as much as quantity.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well, look who planned ahead! ♪ Come on, let's
get started!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet throws herself into training until the
day ends.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
That's... a good point, actually. Okay, fine. But
let me just do one more lap!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'll make sure it's the best lap I've ever done. That
won't be overdoing it, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet runs a lap in her best time yet. She
finishes up training satisfied with her
performance.
